OmniGuardA friendly helper for Laravel

Lightweight, easy to use, and mission-ready.

Installation Guide
Usage Guide
🛡️

Reliable Core

Architecture focused on stability with zero external runtime dependencies. No version conflicts, ever.

🧠

Heuristic Brain

Automated Multi-Discovery Hub maps your codebase using semantic synonym mapping and Fuzzy matching.

⚡

Fast Performance

Efficient O(1) performance using binary integer comparison. Optimized for $1 budget hosting.

Reliable authorization, simple setup, and fast performance.

Welcome to the official documentation for OmniGuard, a friendly and helpful authorization manager for Laravel.

How we help ​

OmniGuard is a tool built to help you manage security in your Laravel application without the headache. We focus on:

By keeping things simple, we eliminate version conflicts, reduce memory overhead, and make your application easier to maintain.

Key Pillars ​

  • 💎 Helpful Core: Zero runtime dependencies on external permission packages.
  • 🧠 Intelligent Discovery: Automatic codebase scanning that helps you map permissions without manual entry.
  • ⚡ Fast Performance: Scalable performance using binary integer comparison.
  • 🏢 Multi-Tenant Support: Built-in isolation for complex multi-user environments.
  • 🛡️ Reliability Protocols: Simple fail-safes for critical environments.

📄 License & Authority ​

OmniGuard is protected under its standard license terms. Permission is granted for use within your application under the original branding of Ahtesham and Broadway Web Services.

💎 Support & Credits ​

OmniGuard was built with care by Ahtesham and Broadway Web Services. We are committed to keeping this tool helpful and reliable for all our partners.

Getting Started ​

To get started with OmniGuard, we recommend following the guides in order:

  1. Installation: Add the helpful core to your Laravel project.
  2. Hierarchy: Set up your roles and their ranks.
  3. Discovery Brain: Speed up security mapping with auto-discovery.
  4. Performance: Learn about our ultra-fast bitmasking.
  5. API Reference: Full details on how to use OmniGuard in your code.
  6. SaaS & Teams: Use OmniGuard for multi-tenant applications.
  7. Security Guide: Special features like Panic Mode and Impersonation.

A helping hand for your Laravel security.
